_description: Structured business rules for healthcare agent decision-making. These are the if/then rules agents use to determine coverage, authorize services, and adjudicate claims.

coverage_rules.name: Preventive Care - Zero Cost Share
coverage_rules.description: All ACA-compliant preventive services are covered at 100% with no member cost sharing when performed by an in-network provider.

coverage_rules.name: Emergency Room - Prudent Layperson Standard
coverage_rules.description: Emergency services are covered at in-network rates regardless of whether the provider is in-network, based on the prudent layperson standard.

coverage_rules.name: HMO Referral Requirement
coverage_rules.description: HMO members must obtain a referral from their PCP before seeing a specialist. Services without referral are denied.
coverage_rules.condition: plan_type == 'HMO' AND service_category == 'Specialist Visit' AND referral_on_file == false

coverage_rules.name: Out-of-Network - PPO Reduced Coverage
coverage_rules.description: PPO plans cover out-of-network services at reduced coinsurance. Member is responsible for balance billing.

coverage_rules.name: Out-of-Network - EPO/HMO Denial
coverage_rules.description: EPO and HMO plans do not cover out-of-network services except emergencies.
coverage_rules.condition: (plan_type == 'EPO' OR plan_type == 'HMO') AND provider.network_status == 'Out-of-Network' AND NOT emergency

coverage_rules.name: Deductible Must Be Met Before Coinsurance
coverage_rules.description: For non-preventive services, the member must meet their annual deductible before the plan begins paying coinsurance.

coverage_rules.name: Out-of-Pocket Maximum Cap
coverage_rules.description: Once a member reaches their annual OOP maximum, the plan pays 100% of covered services for the remainder of the plan year.

coverage_rules.name: Physical Therapy Visit Limit
coverage_rules.description: Physical therapy is limited to 30 visits per plan year. Additional visits require prior authorization and clinical review.
coverage_rules.action: require_prior_auth, if no auth: deny_claim, denial_reason = 'Exceeds benefit maximum'

coverage_rules.name: Telehealth Parity
coverage_rules.description: Telehealth visits are covered at the same rate as in-person visits for the same service category.

coverage_rules.name: Mental Health Parity
coverage_rules.description: Mental health and substance use disorder services must be covered at parity with medical/surgical benefits.
coverage_rules.condition: service_category IN ('Mental Health Outpatient', 'Mental Health Inpatient')
coverage_rules.regulatory_basis: Mental Health Parity and Addiction Equity Act

authorization_rules.name: Inpatient Admission Requires Auth
authorization_rules.description: All non-emergency inpatient hospital admissions require prior authorization. Emergency admissions require notification within 48 hours.
authorization_rules.turnaround_time: Standard: 5 business days, Urgent: 24 hours, Emergency: 48 hours post-admission
authorization_rules.denial_criteria: Admission does not meet InterQual or Milliman criteria for inpatient level of care

authorization_rules.name: Advanced Imaging Auth
authorization_rules.description: MRI, CT, and PET scans require prior authorization. X-rays and ultrasounds do not.
authorization_rules.denial_criteria: Conservative treatment not attempted first, or imaging not supported by clinical indication

authorization_rules.name: Surgical Prior Auth
authorization_rules.description: Elective surgeries require prior authorization with clinical documentation supporting medical necessity.
authorization_rules.condition: procedure_code IN surgical range AND NOT emergency
authorization_rules.denial_criteria: Does not meet medical necessity criteria, conservative treatment not exhausted

authorization_rules.name: Specialty Drug Auth
authorization_rules.description: Tier 4 specialty medications require prior authorization with diagnosis confirmation and step therapy documentation.

authorization_rules.name: DME Prior Auth
authorization_rules.description: Durable medical equipment over $500 requires prior authorization.

authorization_rules.name: Extended Therapy Auth
authorization_rules.description: Physical, occupational, or speech therapy beyond initial visit allotment requires authorization with progress notes.

adjudication_rules.name: Eligibility Check
adjudication_rules.description: Verify member was eligible on the date of service. If not eligible, deny the claim.
adjudication_rules.denial_reason: Member not eligible on date of service

adjudication_rules.name: Duplicate Check
adjudication_rules.description: Check for duplicate claims (same member, same provider, same service date, same procedure code).
adjudication_rules.condition: EXISTS claim WHERE member_id = this.member_id AND provider_id = this.provider_id AND service_date = this.service_date AND procedure_code = this.procedure_code AND claim_id != this.claim_id

adjudication_rules.name: Timely Filing Check
adjudication_rules.description: Claims must be submitted within 365 days of the date of service (180 days for out-of-network).

adjudication_rules.name: Prior Auth Verification
adjudication_rules.description: If the service requires prior authorization, verify an approved auth exists on file.
adjudication_rules.condition: service_requires_auth == true AND NOT EXISTS approved_auth FOR this service

adjudication_rules.name: Network Status Pricing
adjudication_rules.description: Apply contracted rate for in-network, usual/customary rate for out-of-network.
adjudication_rules.action: if in_network: allowed = contracted_rate, else: allowed = min(billed, usual_customary_rate)

adjudication_rules.name: Apply Deductible
adjudication_rules.description: Apply remaining deductible to the allowed amount before calculating coinsurance.

adjudication_rules.name: Apply Copay or Coinsurance
adjudication_rules.description: After deductible, apply the appropriate copay (flat fee) or coinsurance (percentage) based on the benefit schedule.
adjudication_rules.action: if benefit.cost_sharing_type == 'Copay': member_resp = copay_amount, else: member_resp = allowed * (1 - coinsurance_pct)

adjudication_rules.name: OOP Maximum Check
adjudication_rules.description: If member has reached their OOP maximum, the plan pays 100%.

adjudication_rules.name: COB - Coordination of Benefits
adjudication_rules.description: If member has other insurance, determine primary/secondary payer and adjust payment accordingly.

adjudication_rules.name: Generate Payment or Denial
adjudication_rules.description: Final step: generate payment to provider or denial notice to member.
adjudication_rules.action: if plan_paid > 0: status = 'Paid', generate_eob, else: status = 'Denied', generate_denial_notice

pharmacy_rules.name: Generic Substitution
pharmacy_rules.description: When a generic equivalent is available, the generic must be dispensed unless the prescriber specifies DAW (Dispense As Written).

pharmacy_rules.name: Step Therapy - Diabetes
pharmacy_rules.description: GLP-1 agonists (Ozempic, Trulicity) require trial of metformin first. Must show 90-day metformin claim history.
pharmacy_rules.action: deny_claim, denial_reason = 'Step therapy requirement not met'

pharmacy_rules.name: Quantity Limits
pharmacy_rules.description: Controlled substances and high-cost medications have quantity limits per fill.

pharmacy_rules.name: Specialty Pharmacy Mandate
pharmacy_rules.description: Specialty medications must be filled through a designated specialty pharmacy.
pharmacy_rules.condition: medication.formulary_status == 'Specialty' AND pharmacy NOT IN designated_specialty_pharmacies

pharmacy_rules.name: Mail Order Discount
pharmacy_rules.description: 90-day supply via mail order pharmacy receives a cost discount (typically 2x copay for 3x supply).
